title: polypodium simplicissimum var. normale
intro: Polypodium simplicissimum var. normale, also known as Common Polypody or Polypodium, is a species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to various parts of the world, particularly in Europe, Asia, and North America. Traditionally, Polypodium simplicissimum var. normale has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polypodium simplicissimum var. normale is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness.
